description: 不允许 no_change；每一轮都必须提出可执行的实验或修复

Keep the mainline `topk` family and the full reference recipe fixed, changing only `LR` from `8e-4` to `1.2e-3` at `K=128, EXPANSION_FACTOR=12, OPTIMIZER=signum`. This is the smallest policy-valid follow-up after the rejected clean-baseline attempt and should answer one concrete question: whether the current signum topk anchor is mildly under-stepped.
self_review: This stays on the same family, respects the single-variable rule, and follows the recommended search order as closely as the controller allows after rejecting `no_change`. The main risk is that we still lack a true baseline curve, so interpretation must compare curve shape against the reference recipe expectation rather than against an actual completed `LR=8e-4` run.
